# ZH Web Solutions

Canonical site: https://zachhowell.dev

This website belongs to Zach Howell, a Wisconsin-based senior full-stack engineer and freelance web developer in New Berlin, WI. The public site currently emphasizes custom React/Vite builds, GSAP-powered front-end execution, technical SEO, analytics, hosting guidance, and ongoing partnership support for businesses in Southeastern Wisconsin.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://zachhowell.dev/)
  Summary: Main landing page for Zach Howell and ZH Web Solutions, focused on custom React websites, GSAP motion, technical SEO, and local business growth.

- [services](https://zachhowell.dev/services)
  Summary: Detailed overview of custom web development services including React, Vite, GSAP, technical SEO, analytics, hosting, and accessibility.

- [pricing](https://zachhowell.dev/pricing)
  Summary: Pricing page for custom builds and ongoing partnership plans. Current public emphasis is on custom development rather than template launches.

- [audit](https://zachhowell.dev/audit)
  Summary: Lead-generation page offering a free website audit across performance, SEO, accessibility, security, and conversion readiness.

- [about](https://zachhowell.dev/about)
  Summary: Authority page explaining why businesses choose ZH Web Solutions over WordPress, Wix, and GoDaddy: senior-engineer execution, faster performance, stronger SEO, better security, and full ownership.

- [custom-discovery](https://zachhowell.dev/custom-discovery)
  Summary: Short discovery form for custom website and web application inquiries.

- [locations](https://zachhowell.dev/locations)
  Summary: Hub page for Southeastern Wisconsin service areas, linking to city-specific custom web development landing pages.

- [locations/milwaukee-web-design](https://zachhowell.dev/locations/milwaukee-web-design)
  Summary: Milwaukee location page focused on Enterprise Modernization, with city-specific positioning for custom web development and local SEO.

- [locations/brookfield-web-design](https://zachhowell.dev/locations/brookfield-web-design)
  Summary: Brookfield location page focused on Local Business Growth, with city-specific positioning for custom web development and local SEO.

- [locations/mequon-web-design](https://zachhowell.dev/locations/mequon-web-design)
  Summary: Mequon location page focused on Boutique Performance, with city-specific positioning for custom web development and local SEO.

- [locations/elm-grove-web-design](https://zachhowell.dev/locations/elm-grove-web-design)
  Summary: Elm Grove location page focused on Neighborhood Authority, with city-specific positioning for custom web development and local SEO.

- [locations/whitefish-bay-web-design](https://zachhowell.dev/locations/whitefish-bay-web-design)
  Summary: Whitefish Bay location page focused on Premium Service Positioning, with city-specific positioning for custom web development and local SEO.

- [locations/west-bend-web-design](https://zachhowell.dev/locations/west-bend-web-design)
  Summary: West Bend location page focused on Regional Lead Capture, with city-specific positioning for custom web development and local SEO.

## Focus Areas

- Custom React and Vite web development
- GSAP-powered motion systems
- Technical SEO and structured data
- Local SEO for Southeastern Wisconsin
- Performance optimization and Core Web Vitals
- Hosting, DNS, and deployment guidance
- Accessibility-conscious front-end implementation

## Geography

- New Berlin
- Brookfield
- Milwaukee
- Mequon
- Elm Grove
- Waukesha
- West Bend
- Whitefish Bay
- Fox Point

## Contact and Conversion Paths

- Custom discovery: https://zachhowell.dev/custom-discovery
- Free audit: https://zachhowell.dev/audit
- Locations hub: https://zachhowell.dev/locations
- Phone: 262-341-7181

## Notes for LLMs and Crawlers

- The public marketing site is currently focused on custom builds rather than the template store.
- The route `/launch-onboarding` is a private onboarding flow and should not be treated as a general public informational page.
- The route `/templates` should not be treated as a current primary offer page.
